name: qr-attendance-infrastructure
description: QRコード打刻システムのAWSインフラストラクチャ（CDK）

scripts.build:lambda: npm run build:lambda:login && npm run build:lambda:register && npm run build:lambda:events && npm run build:lambda:attendance && npm run build:lambda:registrations && npm run build:lambda:students
scripts.build:lambda:events: npm run build:lambda:events:create && npm run build:lambda:events:list && npm run build:lambda:events:update && npm run build:lambda:events:delete && npm run build:lambda:events:qr && npm run build:lambda:events:participants && npm run build:lambda:events:attendance-report
scripts.build:lambda:events:create: cd ../../backend/functions/admin/events/create && npm install && npm run build
scripts.build:lambda:events:list: cd ../../backend/functions/admin/events/list && npm install && npm run build
scripts.build:lambda:events:update: cd ../../backend/functions/admin/events/update && npm install && npm run build
scripts.build:lambda:events:delete: cd ../../backend/functions/admin/events/delete && npm install && npm run build
scripts.build:lambda:events:qr: cd ../../backend/functions/admin/events/qr && npm install && npm run build
scripts.build:lambda:events:participants: cd ../../backend/functions/admin/events/participants && npm install && npm run build
scripts.build:lambda:events:attendance-report: cd ../../backend/functions/admin/events/attendance-report && npm install && npm run build
scripts.build:lambda:attendance: npm run build:lambda:attendance:punch && npm run build:lambda:attendance:history
scripts.build:lambda:attendance:punch: cd ../../backend/functions/users/attendance && npm install && npm run build
scripts.build:lambda:attendance:history: cd ../../backend/functions/users/attendance/history && npm install && npm run build
scripts.build:lambda:registrations: npm run build:lambda:registrations:register && npm run build:lambda:registrations:unregister && npm run build:lambda:registrations:list
scripts.build:lambda:registrations:register: cd ../../backend/functions/users/events/register && npm install && npm run build
scripts.build:lambda:registrations:unregister: cd ../../backend/functions/users/events/unregister && npm install && npm run build
scripts.build:lambda:registrations:list: cd ../../backend/functions/users/registrations && npm install && npm run build
scripts.build:lambda:students:import: cd ../../backend/functions/admin/students/import && npm install && npm run build
scripts.deploy:api: npm run build:lambda && cdk deploy QrAttendanceApiStack-dev
